## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see added.

## Use Case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the use case that would benefit from this feature.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen or how you envision the solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
